Desde la última vez que mi Universidad UCB actualizó el LMS que los estudiantes y profesores usan todos los días, vino con una vista previa de archivos que no tiene una opción para descargar dichos archivos de manera fácil.

Ripper Web Content | Capture Metadata Content
Extension that analyses and extracts metadata from content found on the web.

Ripper Web Content is a versatile tool that analyses images and documents on a website, extracting detailed information and facilitating various operations on them. This extension is valuable in digital forensics and investigative environments, as well as in the OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) field due to its reverse lookup and face analysis capabilities.

Features:

- Ability to obtain and download image metadata.
- Reverse image search with Google Lens and TinEye.
- Analysis with FotoForensics.
- Face detection: number of people in a photo, gender, age and mood.
- Fast image download.
- Document scanning (.pdf, .docx, .pptx, .xlsx), metadata extraction and downloading.

Save Selected Text with Ease

Effortlessly save selected text from any webpage as .txt, .pdf, .doc, .xlsx, .png, or .html files with the "Save As" Chrome extension. Highlight text, right-click, and choose your preferred format to download instantly. Perfect for students, researchers, and professionals who need quick, versatile text exports. Simple, fast, and no fuss!

Key Features:
- Save text in multiple formats: .txt, .pdf, .doc, .xlsx, .png, .html
- Easy right-click context menu integration
- Lightweight and user-friendly
- No external software required

Download now and streamline your text-saving workflow!
P-Creator Scraper: Export Posts, Memberships, Creators & More
Patreon Scraper: Scrape search results, comments & membership tiers from Patreon. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX easily.

This extension automates the extraction of publicly available data from Patreon, covering creator profiles, posts, membership tiers, comments, and search results. It gathers information directly within your browser, compiling it into structured exports. All processing runs locally on your device, and integrated monitoring tools help you track creator page updates over time.

Key Features
✓ Monitor creator pages for new posts, membership changes, or patron count updates
✓ All scraping and exports processed locally in your browser
✓ Export to CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON
✓ Automatic pagination for large post feeds and search result pages
✓ Batch processing for scraping multiple creator URLs at once
✓ Customizable field selection and conditional formatting

What Data You Can Extract

Search Results: Creator name, creator URL, creation name, avatar URL, member count, post count, NSFW status, free/paid membership indicators, and membership emphasis.

Creator Details: Creator ID, vanity URL, summary, avatar and cover photo URLs, theme color, currency, total patron count, paid member count, post count, collection count, earnings, created and published dates, Discord and RSS availability, shop and community flags, YouTube and Twitter links, and owner information.

Memberships: Tier title, description, amount, currency, free tier indicator, post count, remaining slots, membership URL, image URL, and included items.

Posts: Post ID, title, URL, type, teaser text, published and created dates, like count, comment count, paid status, minimum pledge, view permissions, image and thumbnail URLs, video provider and URL, audio and attachment indicators, and author details.

Comments: Comment body, timestamp, creator and patron author flags, creator like status, vote sum, reply count, visibility, commenter name, URL, image, and associated post information.

Monitoring and Alerts
Page Watcher lets you track changes on any Patreon page and get notified when something updates. Set conditions on specific fields you care about, such as patron count or new posts, and receive alerts via webhook or ntfy.sh when those conditions are met.

Batch Processing
Batch URL Opener allows you to queue multiple Patreon URLs and scrape them all in one session. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from a search results page, then batch-process every link and export the combined results.

Export Formats
- CSV
- Excel (XLSX)
- JSON
- HTML Table
- Raw JSON

Perfect For
This tool is ideal for archiving creator campaign details, tracking public engagement metrics, and compiling membership tier data from Patreon. It serves researchers, content analysts, and anyone who needs structured exports of publicly visible creator information.

Supported Regions
This extension works with Patreon globally and functions across all regions where the website is accessible.

Privacy and Security
All scraping and data exports are processed locally on your machine. General usage metrics are collected to help improve the extension, but no scraped data is transmitted to external servers.

Usage Notice
This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support
For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark
Patreon is a registered trademark of Patreon, Inc. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by Patreon, Inc.

Download images with a single click

What it does:
QuickImage Downloader eliminates the tedious process of downloading images from websites. Instead of right-clicking, opening images in new tabs or remembering keyboard shortcuts, and then saving them, you simply hover over any image and click the download button that appears.
Why users should install it:

☑️ Save time and effort - No more multiple clicks and tab switching. Download images instantly with a single click.
☑️ Works everywhere - Compatible with all websites and image types, including background images and lazy-loaded content that is often hard to save.
☑️ Intelligent filtering - Automatically ignores small images and icons (fully customisable), so the download button only appears on actual photos and graphics. Choose your preferred minimum size from 50px to 300px to focus on the images that matter.
☑️ Clean and simple - The download button appears only when you need it, without cluttering your browsing experience.
☑️ Smart detection - Automatically finds the original, full-resolution image URL for the best quality downloads.
☑️ Perfect for professionals - Essential tool for designers, researchers, students, content creators, and anyone who regularly saves images from the web.
☑️ No learning curve - Works immediately after installation. No setup, no registration, no configuration needed.
☑️ Privacy focussed - No data collection. Everything works locally on your device.

Transform the way you save images online. Install QuickImage Downloader and experience how effortless image downloading should be.
A browser extension to easily save images from Google Docs

Looking for a simple way to download images from Google Docs? Our Chrome extension lets you quickly and easily save any image directly from a Google Doc to your device with just a few clicks. Say goodbye to workarounds and time-consuming methods! Whether you're a student, designer, or professional, this tool simplifies your workflow.

Why Install?

Effortless Image Saving: Save images from Google Docs in their original quality instantly.
Time-Saving: No need to copy-paste or take screenshots—get images directly with one click.
Convenience: Perfect for professionals, students, researchers, and anyone needing fast access to embedded images.
Streamline your work with our easy-to-use image-saving solution!
Batch collect and download Pinterest pictures

This is a tool software specially used for batch collection and download of Pinterest pictures, which can efficiently obtain a large number of picture resources from the Pinterest platform. The software has a powerful Pinterest picture scraper function, which can automatically scan and identify all the picture content on the Pinterest page, and supports multiple ways of picture collection such as keywords, users, and artboards. 
The software provides a smart picture downloader function, which supports batch download of Pinterest pictures. Users can download all the pictures in the entire artboard or a specific search result at one time. The original quality and resolution of the picture are automatically maintained during the download process to ensure that high-definition picture resources are obtained. Supports a variety of picture formats including JPG, PNG, GIF, etc. to meet the needs of pictures for different purposes. 
The tool has advanced filtering functions, which can accurately collect pictures according to conditions such as picture size, color, and upload time. Supports setting download quantity limits to avoid excessive collection and occupying storage space. The software also provides a picture preview function, where users can view picture thumbnails before downloading and selectively download the required content. 
Pinterest collector supports multi-threaded download technology, which significantly improves download speed and efficiency. It has a breakpoint resume function, which can continue unfinished download tasks after network interruption. The software also provides an automatic deduplication function to avoid downloading duplicate image files and save storage space. 
Users can customize the download path and file naming rules, and support automatic organization of downloaded image files by date, keyword, user name, etc. The software also has a collection history function, which can view and manage previous download tasks. It supports exporting collection results in Excel or CSV format to facilitate subsequent image resource management and analysis. The tool also provides a scheduled collection function, which can be set to automatically collect new images of specific content on a regular basis.

Export Gemini chats to HTML, JSON, and Markdown with a single click.

One-Click Export for Your Gemini Conversations.

Simple Exporter for Gemini™ is an efficient tool for archiving and repurposing your Gemini conversations. With a single click, export any chat into three formats: HTML, JSON, or Markdown.

---------- IMPORTANT NOTE & USAGE TIP ----------
To ensure a complete export of very long conversations, please scroll to the very top of the chat before using the extension. This loads all messages, allowing the extension to capture the full conversation.

---------- FEATURES ----------
* HTML (Interactive Archive):
Saves a rich, interactive HTML file with dark mode, code copying, and collapsible sections. Perfect for creating readable archives and for sharing.

* Markdown (For Content Creators & Developers):
Creates clean, portable Markdown, ready for technical documentation or personal notes.

* JSON (For Data & Backup):
Exports a structured JSON file with the conversation data. Ideal for backups, data analysis, or use in other applications.

---------- PRIVACY & SECURITY ----------
- 100% Local Processing: All data processing occurs entirely within your browser.
- No Data Collection: Your chat history and personal data are never collected, stored, or transmitted.
- Open Source: The full source code is available for review, providing complete transparency.

---------- USAGE ----------
1. Navigate to an active Gemini chat page.
2. Click the extension icon in your toolbar.
3. Select your desired export format.
4. The file will be downloaded via your browser's "Save As" dialog.

---
Disclaimer: This extension is not developed, affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by Google. All trademarks related to Gemini™ are the property of Google LLC.
S-Market Scraper: Export Products, Reviews, Stores & More
Shopee Scraper: Scrape product details, variants & pricing data. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX with ease.

Extract product listings, customer reviews, and store information from Shopee directly in your browser. This e-commerce marketplace scraper captures data from search results, product pages, variant details, and store profiles, then exports everything in your preferred format. All processing happens locally on your machine. Set up monitoring to track price changes, stock updates, or seller performance and receive instant alerts.

Key Features
✓ Monitor any Shopee page for changes and receive alerts via webhook or ntfy.sh
✓ All scraping runs locally in your browser, no data sent to external servers
✓ Export in CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON formats
✓ Automatic pagination for large product lists and review sections
✓ Batch process multiple product URLs in a single session
✓ Customize which fields to include in your export

What Data You Can Extract
Products: Product name, brand, price, price before discount, currency, discount, stock, sold count, historical sold, liked count, comment count, rating star, rating count, category ID, shop name, shop location, images, free shipping status, flash sale, official shop, and verification status.
Product Details: Item ID, product name, brand, price range (min/max), price before discount, stock, rating, category, shop location, images, description, total models, color options, size options, and attributes.
Product Variants: Model ID, variant name, variant price, original variant price, variant stock, promotion ID, variant status, and associated product and shop information.
Reviews: Review ID, comment text, rating star, author username, images, submit time, like count, product quality score, seller service score, and delivery service score.
Store Details: Shop ID, shop name, follower count, rating star, item count, response rate, cancellation rate, response time, and description.

Monitoring & Alerts
Use the Page Watcher add-on to track changes on any Shopee page. Set conditions on specific fields such as price, stock level, or sold count, and receive instant notifications when values change. Alerts can be delivered via webhook or ntfy.sh, so you can track Shopee price drops or stock changes without manually checking.

Batch Processing
The Batch URL Opener add-on lets you queue multiple Shopee product URLs for processing in one session. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from search results and category pages. Each URL is opened, scraped, and the results are combined into a single export file.

Export Formats
CSV
Excel (XLSX)
JSON
HTML Table
Raw JSON

Perfect For
This extension is ideal for sellers benchmarking competitor products on Shopee, researchers analyzing marketplace trends, and buyers tracking prices across multiple stores. Use it to compile product catalogs or monitor store performance metrics on Shopee.

Supported Regions
This extension works with Shopee across multiple countries, including Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Philippines, Vietnam, Taiwan, Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, Chile, and all other regions where Shopee operates.

Privacy & Security
All scraping and data exports are processed locally on your machine. General usage metrics are collected to help improve the extension, but your scraped data is never transmitted to external servers.

Usage Notice
This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support
For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark
Shopee is a registered trademark of Sea Limited. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by Sea Limited.
Capture scrolling screenshots and download images from webpages. Perfect for comics, manga, and content panels.

Panel Downloader
Capture scrolling screenshots and batch download images in reading order.

🖼️ Area Scrolling Capture Select any specific area on a page (like a chat window or feed) to capture scrolling content. The extension automatically scrolls, captures, and stitches everything into one seamless image.
Perfect for social media threads, comics, and chat histories.
Intelligent scroll detection for inner containers.

📥 Sequential Image Downloader Detect and download all main images from a webpage in the exact order they appear.

Reading Order: Preserves top-to-bottom, left-to-right sequence (ideal for manga/comics).
Preview Mode: See exactly what you are downloading before you save.

✨ Highlights

Customizable: Set minimum image sizes and custom folder names.
Modern UI: Clean, dark-themed interface.

🎯 Perfect For
Comic and manga readers
Social media threads & archives
Image gallery collections

💡 Quick Start
Screenshot: Open extension > Screenshot tab > Select Area > Start Capture.
Download: Open extension > Images tab > Preview Order > Download Now.
A browser extension wallet from Decentralized Authority.

NodeWallet is an open source, browser-based POKT wallet built by Decentralized Authority, the team behind Node Pilot. It is one of the most secure and user-friendly ways to interact with the Pocket Network ecosystem.

NodeWallet features:

* Universal Seed Phrase Importer (Import seed phrases from other popular wallets, so you don’t need a POKT specific seed phrase for POKT addresses)
* Key file and private key importer
* Generate endless POKT addresses from one seed
* Manage multiple seed wallets
* wPOKT Bridge compatible
* Open source with plugin design to make it contributor friendly for adding features and expanding to other networks
* Utilizes argon2 + AES-256 GCM for quantum secure encryption

Jump into the POKT ecosystem today with NodeWallet!

Resaltar, editar y descargar en PDF.

La extensión "Highlighter & PDF" para Google Chrome es la herramienta esencial para resaltar texto en una página web, hacer ediciones rápidas y descargarlo como un PDF personalizado. Simplifica tu experiencia de toma de notas en línea con esta extensión intuitiva y eficiente.



"Highlighter & PDF" es la herramienta esencial que estabas buscando para potenciar tu productividad en la web. Esta extensión te permite resaltar texto en cualquier página web, realizar ediciones rápidas y descargar contenido directamente en formato PDF, todo en un solo lugar.

🌟 Características destacadas:

📌 Resalta tu camino: Con nuestra extensión, puedes marcar y resaltar fácilmente cualquier texto importante en una página web. Organiza tus lecturas, subraya conceptos clave y mantén tus notas ordenadas.

🖋️ Edita sobre la marcha: ¿Encontraste un error o necesitas hacer una corrección rápida en el contenido que estás leyendo? "Highlighter & PDF" te permite hacer ediciones sobre la marcha, facilitando la personalización de tus notas.

📥 Descarga en PDF personalizado: Olvídate de copiar y pegar en un documento separado. Con un solo clic, puedes descargar el contenido resaltado y editado como un PDF personalizado. Esto es perfecto para archivar tus notas o compartir información con otros de manera profesional.

💡 Intuitivo y eficiente: Nuestra extensión se ha diseñado pensando en la simplicidad y la eficiencia. Es fácil de usar, con una interfaz intuitiva que no requiere de conocimientos técnicos. Ahorrarás tiempo y esfuerzo al tomar notas en línea.

"Highlighter & PDF" es una solución perfecta para estudiantes, profesionales, investigadores y cualquier persona que quiera optimizar su proceso de toma de notas en línea.

Descarga la extensión hoy mismo desde la Chrome Web Store y descubre cómo "Highlighter & PDF" puede mejorar tu productividad en línea. ¡No esperes más para simplificar tu experiencia de toma de notas en la web!

One-click on-page SEO audit: meta, Open Graph, schema.org, hreflang, links, speed, Core Web Vitals, readability, one-click export.

SEO Tools PRO — Instant On-Page SEO Audit + Live Google Rank Tracker, Right In Your Browser.

The fastest way to audit any page's SEO and track Google rankings — free, unlimited, no login. Built for professionals who want answers, not a SaaS bill.

One click reveals everything that matters: title, meta, schema.org markup, Core Web Vitals, link health, image audit, keyword density, and a 100-point SEO score. Plus a live Keyword Rank Tracker that measures your TRUE organic position on 20+ Google domains — separated from the visual position that counts ads, AI Overview, and featured snippets above you.

▸ WHY TEAMS PICK SEO TOOLS PRO

• Free forever. No trial, no upsell, no upgrade prompts.
• Works in any country — 20 Google search domains, 8 native UI languages.
• Honest numbers. Organic position is reported separately from visual position.
• Privacy-first. Everything runs locally. No tracking by default.
• Lightweight. ~150 KB. Loads in milliseconds. Zero third-party libraries.

▸ LIVE GOOGLE RANK TRACKER (FLAGSHIP)

Enter a keyword + target domain. We open Google in a new tab and our content script reads the live SERP to compute:

• Your real ORGANIC position
• Your VISUAL position (counts ads, featured snippets, AI Overview, PAA, knowledge panel, image / video / news packs above you)
• Multi-occurrence warning when your domain ranks more than once
• AI Overview citation detection in 8 languages — knows when Google's AI cites your domain
• Visual overlay: #N badge next to every organic result, 🎯 sticker on your domain, sticky summary bar

Supports 20 Google domains: .com, .com.vn, .co.uk, .de, .fr, .es, .it, .com.au, .ca, .co.jp, .co.kr, .com.br, .com.mx, .com.tr, .com.sg, .com.hk, .co.in, .com.tw, .pl, .nl.

Multi-page accumulation: scroll to page 2, 3, 4 — we merge with a 30-minute freshness window. History of 50 checks with one-click re-scan.

▸ ON-PAGE SEO AUDIT

100-Point SEO Score — weighted across 16 factors with pass / warn / fail and an animated gauge. Click any quickstat to filter to just Passed, Warnings, or Failed.

Schema.org Reader — parses JSON-LD (including @graph and root arrays from Yoast / RankMath / Schema App), Microdata (itemscope / itemtype / itemprop), and RDFa Lite (typeof / property). Matches Schema.org Validator's entity count. Tree view shows nested entities (HowToStep × 4, Product Offer, Article author + publisher + ImageObject). One-click jump to Google Rich Results Test.

Core Web Vitals — LCP, CLS, INP measured with web.dev's official thresholds via PerformanceObserver. No third-party services.

Meta & Social Preview — pixel-accurate Open Graph and Twitter Card previews exactly as your link will look when shared. Title, meta description, canonical, robots, hreflang.

Link Inspector — every row shows anchor + URL. Click to expand: full URL, raw href, title, rel breakdown (nofollow / sponsored / ugc / noopener / noreferrer), target. Detects tabnabbing (target="_blank" without rel="noopener"). Filter by internal / external / nofollow / warnings.

Plus: Heading H1–H6 tree, image audit (alt / width / height / lazy-loading), readability (Flesch + reading time), keyword density (1- to 6-gram, 5 language stop-word lists auto-selected), technical health (HTTPS, viewport, robots.txt + sitemap.xml probe, mixed-content detector), page performance (TTFB / FCP / heaviest resources).

▸ EXPORT & WORKFLOW

• Export as JSON, CSV (formula-injection-protected for Excel safety), or self-contained HTML — ready for client deliverables
• 8 native UI languages: English, Vietnamese, German, French, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
• Light / Dark / Auto theme — syncs with your OS in real time
• WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility — full ARIA tab pattern, keyboard nav, focus-visible, prefers-reduced-motion, forced-colors
• 10-tab dashboard in a 720 × 540 (4:3) popup that respects your eyes

▸ WHO IT'S FOR

• SEO specialists running dozens of on-page audits and rank checks per day
• Agencies producing client-facing audit + ranking reports
• Content writers checking meta, headings, and keyword balance before publish
• Web developers validating schema.org / JSON-LD / Microdata / RDFa output
• Vietnamese SEO consultants needing google.com.vn rank tracking with AI Overview detection
• Small-business owners who want a professional second opinion on their own site

▸ PRIVACY — HONEST DISCLOSURE

No account. No login. No profile. No tracking by default.

What runs locally only:
• On-page audit — reads the active tab when you click the icon
• Rank tracker — runs only on Google search pages you visit
• Rank history (50 entries) + affiliate click counters — stored on your device in chrome.storage; never transmitted

Optional diagnostic telemetry (OFF by default):
If you enable it in Settings, the extension logs anonymous scan-complete events (version, browser kind, sanitized score, counts) to a local 200-event ring buffer. URLs, hostnames, page contents auto-redacted. Optional self-hosted beacon endpoint — if blank, the log stays purely on your machine.

▸ AFFILIATE DISCLOSURE

The footer's Smart Tool Recommendations slot surfaces one context-aware partner suggestion based on the tab you're viewing — KWFinder when reviewing content, LinkMiner when auditing backlinks, SiteGround / Hostinger when reviewing performance, etc.

Partners: SE Ranking, Mangools (KWFinder, SERPChecker, SERPWatcher, LinkMiner, SiteProfiler), SiteGround, Hostinger, Make.com, Parallels, Envato.

Each link is clearly labeled "Affiliate" / "Quảng cáo" and includes affiliate tracking codes plus UTM tags. The partner sees that you arrived from this extension — never which page you were auditing. We earn a small commission if you sign up; the price you pay is the same. Toggle off anytime in Settings → "Tool recommendations".

▸ PERMISSIONS

• activeTab — read the focused tab when you click the icon
• scripting — inject the audit scanner
• storage — persist settings, 50-entry rank history, click counters
• downloads — export audits as JSON / CSV / HTML
• alarms — periodic freshness check for rank results
• Content scripts on Google search pages — required for live SERP rank tracking; runs only on the 20 listed Google domains, never any other site

▸ ABOUT

Built and maintained by VLINK ASIA — a Vietnam-based digital marketing studio focused on practical, no-nonsense SEO. Feedback and feature requests welcome at https://www.vlink.asia/en/seo-tools/seo-tools-check/

★ CHANGELOG

v2.7.0 — May 2026 (major release)
• NEW: Keyword Rank Tracker — type keyword + target domain, opens Google search, content script reports your real organic position with a visual SERP overlay (gutter #N badges, 🎯 sticker, sticky summary bar). Supports 20 Google domains.
• Smart SERP block classification: organic vs ad vs featured snippet vs AI Overview vs PAA vs knowledge panel vs image / video / news pack.
• AI Overview citation detector — 8-language heading-text matching, knows when Google's AI cites your domain.
• Multi-page accumulation: scroll to page 2, 3, 4 — results merged with 30-minute freshness window.
• Multi-occurrence warning when your domain ranks more than once on a page.
• History of last 50 checks with one-click re-scan per row.
• Smart Tool Recommendations in popup footer — context-aware partner suggestions (KWFinder when reviewing content, LinkMiner for backlinks, SiteGround / Hostinger for slow pages, etc.). Always disclosed as "Affiliate" / "Quảng cáo", always toggleable in Settings.
• 6 additional UI locales: German, French, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese (total 8 languages).
• Popup redesigned to 720 × 540 (4:3 ratio) for comfortable above-the-fold content density.
• 10-tab dashboard — Rank Tracker placed second after Overview for fast access.
• Opt-in diagnostic telemetry framework (OFF by default, local 200-event ring buffer, PII auto-redaction, optional self-hosted beacon).
• Refreshed branding + new icon set.

v2.3.2 — May 2026
• Link inspector overhaul: every row shows both anchor text AND URL, click to expand for full detail (anchor, URL, raw href, title, rel, target).
• Image-only anchors now surface the img alt attribute as fallback anchor text, with an indicator badge.
• Tabnabbing detection: flags target="_blank" links missing rel="noopener".
• Empty href and no-text warnings shown inline as badges.

v2.3.1 — May 2026
• Added 4-gram, 5-gram, and 6-gram long-phrase analysis with segmented switcher.

v2.3.0 — May 2026
• Core Web Vitals: LCP, CLS, INP with Google's official thresholds (web.dev/vitals).
• Mixed-content detector for HTTPS pages loading HTTP subresources.
• Multi-language stop-words: English, Vietnamese, Spanish, French, German (auto from HTML lang).
• Vietnamese popup UI via Chrome i18n — automatic for vi-* browser locales.
• Light / Dark / Auto theme with live system-theme syncing.

v2.2.x — May 2026
• Three-state scoring criteria (pass / warn / fail) replacing binary pass / fail.
• Quickstats clickable as filters.
• Tree view for nested schema entities.
• Full Microdata parser, RDFa Lite parser, recursive @type discovery in JSON-LD.

v2.2.0 — May 2026
• MV3 hardening, internationalization scaffold, stricter CSP, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, CSV injection-safe export, -700 KB legacy dependencies stripped (jQuery, Bootstrap, Font Awesome, Glyphicons).

v2.1.0 — May 2026
• Initial Chrome Web Store launch.

Bulk download images from Gemini conversations on gemini.google.com.

Save every AI-generated image from your Gemini AI conversations with one click ✨  
Gemini Bulk Image Downloader is a Chrome extension for Google Gemini that adds a small, floating control on gemini.google.com, allowing you to bulk download all images generated by Gemini image generation models (including Nano Banana 🍌 and future Google AI image tools). It automatically collects all visible Gemini images in a chat and saves them into an organized folder in your Downloads 📁.

What it does 🚀

• Bulk download all images from the current Google Gemini conversation  
• One-click image downloader for Gemini AI chats on gemini.google.com  
• Custom folder naming per Gemini chat or conversation ID  
• Progress indicator with automatic retry for failed image downloads 🔄 
• Light and dark mode friendly UI that stays out of your way 

How it works ⚙️

1. Open any Google Gemini AI conversation on https://gemini.google.com/  
2. Click “Save Images” on the floating Gemini Image Downloader control  
3. The extension scans the conversation for Gemini-generated images
4. Watch the download progress; retry appears automatically if any Gemini image fails 

Storage 💾

Images are saved locally to:  
Downloads/{folder-name}/{index}.png

The folder name is based on your custom name or the parsed Gemini conversation ID, making it easy to organize AI-generated images from Google Gemini, image generation experiments, and Nano Banana-style prompts.

High-resolution image limitation (important) ⚠️

At the moment, Google Gemini generates the final “full-resolution” images using a download flow that is intentionally isolated from the page 🔒. Because of this, the extension currently saves the highest resolution that is directly accessible from the conversation view, which is typically the medium-size image.

I spent an unreasonable amount of time testing multiple approaches — hover-based extraction, button click automation, download interception, DOM scraping, and direct asset URL discovery . Unfortunately, the true full-resolution file is generated and delivered in a way that browser extensions cannot reliably hook into without breaking Chrome security rules.

I’m actively researching cleaner and more reliable ways to access the original high-resolution Gemini images without violating Chrome extension policies 🔍. Once a working solution is found, it will be shipped immediately as an update 📦.
Download entire AI conversation log from poe.com

PoeLog is a simple Chrome extension that allows you to download a full transcript of your conversation with an AI bot on poe.com. It's particularly useful for capturing long-running conversations that you may want to use as a source of data for other purposes.

Usage

1. Navigate to poe.com and start a conversation with an AI bot.
2. Once you've completed the conversation you want to save, click the PoeLog extension icon in the Chrome toolbar.
3. The extension will generate a text file containing the full transcript of your conversation, including both your messages and the bot's responses.
4. The file will be automatically downloaded to your default downloads location.

Notes

- PoeLog does not send any data to external servers. All processing is done locally within the Chrome browser.

Contributing

If you'd like to contribute to PoeLog or report any issues, please visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/elifiner/poelog).

License

PoeLog is released under the [MIT License](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT).

Layman Law reader is an extension that helps users translate contract clauses into easy to understand language

🔎 Know what you're signing 
There's no denying the power of a good contract. But often, the hard-to-grasp language of legal documents can leave you in the dark about just how much commitment you're agreeing to — until it's too late. Put an end to that cycle for good with Layman Law Reader!

This powerful AI tool translates difficult-to-understand terms from contracts into plain English in just a few seconds, saving you time and energy. So now, whenever you make an important agreement, you know exactly what you're getting into. 

Layman Law Reader takes the hassle out of reading through complex legalese and ensures that every time you commit to a contract, you do so with confidence. 

Whether it's a major business deal or an agreement between friends, let Layman Law Reader give you comfort and control over your commitments. With accurate translations, clear explanations, and critical insights included at each step of the way, this essential tool will keep your legal affairs in check — fast! So don't waste time struggling to comprehend those complicated clauses — use Layman Law Reader today!

🥢 How it works:
-See a weird clause in any legal contract online
-Copy and paste it into Layman Law's reader 
-Layman Law distills it down to the main point.

Employment Contracts

-Viola!
